mission.title: grpc: Typescript typings for node package
mission.description: Typescript typings for node package. Requested by 33+ users.

steps.title: Check current grpc setup
steps.description:
Verify your grpc version:
gRPC library — check your language-specific package (e.g., pip show grpcio, npm ls @grpc/grpc-js)
This feature requires grpc as a dependency.

steps.title: Review grpc configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant grpc configuration:
I've written this in https://github.com/DefinitelyTyped/DefinitelyTyped/issues/11264, but it would be best for the node package to come with it's own typings, since Typescript 2.0 got officially released.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Typescript typings for node package
steps.description:
This PR closes #8233 
It adds the most basic typings for TypeScript of the public API of `grpc` for Node.js.

All details are not defined in this, as I'm no expert in reading the native parts of the module. I've used these definitions for a while and trusts the API. Let me know if anything needs to be corrected or otherwise modified.

All comments etc. are from the existing documentations.

Example usage:

```typescript
import * as grpc from 'grpc';

const server = new

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Typescript typings for node package" is functioning correctly.
